item.title: Debugger: add `t` for run-to-terminator and support count step
item.body: This PR implements two features: * Add `t` keystroke for run-to-terminator, meaning continue to the next terminator available, and reverse step works because each reached terminator snapshot is recorded. * For quick run, press a series of numbers like `12`, following a step ` ` or a run-to-terminator `t`, the execution will continue until it hits the count. This is useful when you don't know the stackframe name, and need to run a few more times consecutively. NOTE: run-to-terminator or count step doesn't store statement states during the execution, but does store terminator states in history. We can support a new keystroke like `S` to store each state when quick run happens. But it's out of the current PR.

repo.name: miri
repo.description: [A forked miri for OS] An interpreter for Rust's mid-level intermediate representation

issue.title: Debugger: add `t` for run-to-terminator and support count step
issue.body: This PR implements two features: * Add `t` keystroke for run-to-terminator, meaning continue to the next terminator available, and reverse step works because each reached terminator snapshot is recorded. * For quick run, press a series of numbers like `12`, following a step ` ` or a run-to-terminator `t`, the execution will continue until it hits the count. This is useful when you don't know the stackframe name, and need to run a few more times consecutively. NOTE: run-to-terminator or count step doesn't store statement states during the execution, but does store terminator states in history. We can support a new keystroke like `S` to store each state when quick run happens. But it's out of the current PR.

commit.message: debugger: store last_state on the heap

debugger: fix split_locals by unique addr instead of provenance

because different locals can have the same addr different but borrow tags
which cause provenances to be different
debugger: Step or RunToTerminator with count; fix recv blocking bug
debugger: add mir line number and len info
debugger: auto truncate log file when the first logging happens

debugger: fix reverse interaction; remove display_state

also add run_immediately to force rendering the frame
debugger: don't reset reverse_index if recv runs
debugger: refactor crossterm event by making it a channel msg
